title: Subaru’s new top-selling EV delivers over 300 miles of range for just $35,000
summary: The Uncharted is now Subaru’s most popular and most affordable EV in the US. Subaru announced that prices for the 2027 Uncharted EV will start at $35,000.

title: Range Rover’s first EV will beat its gas counterpart, but it may cost over $150,000
summary: The “best” Range Rover has an electric powertrain, according to JLR’s chief growth officer, Lennard Hoornik. Although it may outperform its gas-powered counterpart, the Range Rover EV won’t be cheap, with prices that could top $150,000.

title: McMurtry teases its record-shattering electric ‘fan car’ ahead of production
summary: McMurtry Automotive, a British company that built a bonkers electric car prototype which has shattered track records everywhere it goes, teased the production version of its Spéirling ‘fan car’, to be unveiled next week.

title: Prime Day-3 Deals: ECOVACS LiDAR Pro robot mowers back at lows, Jackery Prime Day power station sale + new releases, more
summary:
We’re halfway through this week’s Prime Day Sale event, with two more days left to jump on all the very best Green Deals we’ve collected – which can all be found within our regularly updated Prime Day Green Deals roundup hub here. Some of our notable headliners getting the spotlight today are ECOVACS’ three newest LiDAR Pro Robot Lawn Mowers back at their lowest prices starting from $1,000, as well as Jackery’s increased Prime Day power station sale savings with up to 65% discounts, three bonus savings codes, and three new releases – all starting from $514. We also have Navee’s full Prime Day EV Sale lineup with offers like the XT5 Pro Off-Road Electric Scooter hitting a new $950 low, and so much more packed in below.

Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

title: Polestar barred from US over the Chinese connected vehicle rule, a dangerous precedent
summary:
Polestar is pulling new vehicles out of the US market starting with model year 2027 after the Commerce Department declined to grant it authorization under the Connected Vehicle Rule, the company confirmed today.

The decision effectively ends new-car sales in the US for the Geely-owned Swedish EV brand — even though one of its models is assembled in South Carolina.

title: Toyota is recalling over 20,000 EVs, including Lexus and Subaru models
summary: Toyota issued a recall affecting nearly 21,000 electric vehicles, including Lexus and Subaru models.

title: The Lexus ES EV barely beat its range estimate in the real world, but falls short of rivals
summary: The all-electric Lexus ES 350e traveled slightly further in the real world than its EPA-estimated 292 miles, but it still trails key rivals.

title: Europe and North Africa are getting their first undersea power link
summary: Italy and Tunisia have taken a major step toward building the first DC power link between Europe and North Africa.

title: CATL chief: solid-state batteries at ‘level 4 of 9,’ no leap until 2030
summary:
Robin Zeng Yuqun, the founder and chairman of CATL, the world’s largest EV battery maker, just poured cold water on the solid-state battery hype, saying the much-anticipated technology is only at “level four” of a nine-step readiness scale.

Speaking at “Summer Davos” in China this week, Zeng predicted that an inflection point for the technology won’t arrive until 2030 — and even warned that its commercial viability has yet to be established.

title: Avinox shows off wild new gearbox motor concept as it expands across the e-bike industry
summary:
Avinox may still be one of the newest names in the e-bike drive system industry, but the company isn’t wasting any time pushing the envelope.

At Eurobike 2026 in Frankfurt this week, the e-bike motor manufacturer unveiled its latest concept technology, dubbed the MG Concept Motor. Developed in partnership with major bicycle brands including Canyon, Commencal, Forbidden, and Mondraker, the new drive unit aims to rethink one of the most maintenance-intensive aspects of modern e-bikes: the drivetrain.

title: How Hankook Is Making EV Tires Better
summary: The company's line of iON tires is designed to maximize durability and range. You can experience them yourself at Electrify Expo Demo Days.

title: Tesla Is Giving Away Free Supercharging. Here's How To Win.
summary: Tesla is gamifying charging and will reward the winners with free Supercharging for the life of the car. Here's how to win.

title: The Peaq Is Peak Skoda. Too Bad America Can’t Buy It
summary: The Peaq is a big, sensible, seven-seat electric SUV with serious space and range and a very reasonable price.

title: Slate's $24,950 EV Truck Will Test What America Really Wants
summary: The Slate will be both the country’s cheapest new electric vehicle and its lowest-priced pickup. But will it be an automatic slam dunk?

title: Rivian Discontinues Its Cheapest R1T And R1S As R2 Rolls Out
summary: Rivian flagged earlier this year that the Dual Standard variants of its large SUV and truck were on the way out.

title: This Ex-Rental Tesla's Battery Was Heavily Degraded. Then The Decline Slowed
summary: After losing 20% of its capacity in its first two years, this abused Tesla’s battery degradation appears to have almost plateaued.

title: Rivian Has A Bold Plan For You To Skip The Repair Shop
summary: Rivian says 80% of EV repairs could eventually be handled by its mobile fleet, reducing the need for visits to physical service centers.

title: A Driverless Xiaomi Electric SUV Just Lapped The Ring. We Have Questions
summary: A 10-minute Nurburgring lap time isn't impressive. The fact that there is nobody in the driver’s seat is what makes this unique.

title: Tesla FSD Finally Reached Europe. Now Speed Limits May Slow Its Expansion
summary: Sweden has a problem with FSD breaking the speed limit on demand.

title: A Tesla Model Y Battery Test Looked Bad. Then The Degradation Almost Stopped
summary: After a sharp early drop, this Tesla Model Y's recent battery health test suggests this mostly fast-charged LFP pack has settled down.
